hero.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
hero.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a day for self-discovery and inner strength. Embrace your adventurous spirit.
aries.love: Romance is in the air, spark new connections or deepen existing bonds.
aries.career: Your leadership skills will shine; take charge and inspire your colleagues.

taurus.general: Stability is key today. Focus on building solid foundations in your life.
taurus.love: Seek comfort in the familiar; nurturing your relationships can bring joy.
taurus.career: Perseverance will pay off, keep focusing on your long-term goals.

gemini.general: A day of communication awaits; let your ideas flow freely.
gemini.love: Expressing your feelings openly will strengthen your romantic ties.
gemini.career: Collaboration is essential today; work well with your team for great results.

cancer.general: Embrace your emotions today; they will guide you to deeper insights.
cancer.love: Intimacy deepens through heartfelt conversations; don't shy away from sharing.
cancer.career: Trust your intuition when making decisions at work; it will lead you right.

leo.general: Shine brightly as your natural charisma draws people to you.
leo.love: Passion ignites your love life; don't hold back your feelings.
leo.career: Creative projects may flourish; put your artistic side to work.

virgo.general: Focus on the details today; precision will bring success.
virgo.love: Listening deeply can help resolve any misunderstandings in your relationships.
virgo.career: Organization will be your ally; tidy up your workspace for better clarity.

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
professional.author: Norman Vaughan

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: It always seems impossible until it is done.
motivation.author: Nelson Mandela

motivation.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
motivation.author: Henry David Thoreau

motivation.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
motivation.author: Zig Ziglar

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

captions.text: Life is too short to wait.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Dream without fear, love without limits.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Be the change you wish to see in the world.
captions.author: Mahatma Gandhi

captions.text: Do what you love, love what you do.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Create the life you can’t wait to wake up to.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The advance of technology is based on making it fit in so that you don't even even notice it.
tech.author: Bill Gates

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The greatest part of a road trip isn't arriving at your destination. It's all the wild stuff that happens along the way.
tech.author: Emma Chase

tech.text: What we fear doing most is usually what we most need to do.
tech.author: Tim Ferriss

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: The secret of staying young is to live honestly, eat slowly, and lie about your age.
fun.author: Lucille Ball

fun.text: You’re only as young as you feel.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Life is more fun if you live it sarcastically.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: If you're going to be weird, be confident about it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
faith.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

faith.text: What we hope ever to do with ease, we must first do with diligence.
faith.author: Samuel Johnson

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fears.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie Ten Boom

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
wisdom.author: Søren Kierkegaard

wisdom.text: Patience is the companion of wisdom.
wisdom.author: Saint Augustine

wisdom.text: To know what you know and what you do not know, that is true knowledge.
wisdom.author: Confucius
